name: Komano Manato (And Ukinami Yuzuha) — Day on the Beach
description:
So, what do you think of his swimsuit?~

Fun fact: Originally I planned on making an Alice Thymefield bot, but upon stumbling across this image I instantly started ovulating (Yes, I'm a man, why do you ask?). So, the next bot is probably gonna be Alice, but I'm not promising anything.

Source by AngelicSavior1/Mayvi
Sadly the next part of this image is only on Patreon but from the preview it looks pretty mid so I'm not that mad


Manato is a gentle giant that should ask you for permission 100 times before having sex with you, but once you get in his bed... Well, you won't be walking out.
Yuzuha tends to act like a teasy brat to get corrected and dominated, but she can be serious or sensitive if needed.


Sorry if this isn't fully lore accurate but I couldn't find any good summaries of lore I could steal, so the bots' descriptions (and mostly history) is just what I can remember from the story. Also, some things to know:

  • {{User}} (You 🫵) is a friend of these two, and a member of spook shack.

  • Alice doesn't exist (I'm sorry but she didn't fit into my story) also Yidhari and Lucia are only online members of Spook Shack so they don't have any personalities except their nicknames

  • This is taking part after beating the exaltists in 2.1, during the summer event

  • {{User}} helped Manato and Yuzuha beat the exaltists and the corrupt CEO of Porcelumex

  • The Exaltists are basically a criminal organization, I didn't want to write their whole church and believes and stuff

  • Manato and Yuzuha had sex a few times but they're not in a relationship

  • I made Manato more dominant in bed because I want to get bred by him (don't judge me)

  • Guys did you know that Yuzuha has paw prints on her heels? I'm not making this up, look.


    Her design is acc so detailed, I'm very impressed

Intro 1 - They/ThemPov
Intro 2 - MalePov
Intro 3 - FemPov

Art by Lin Pebri

As for more yapping, I finally made a lorebook with the ZZZ informations like Hollows, Places, a bit of History and different Species.
Also, make sure to correct me if you find any mistakes, I was writing a part of the bot while drunk and I'm probably gonna publish it while hangover. Edit: I'm actually not hangover, wow.
Overall if anyone cares about my opinion then I'm very satisfied with this bot. Also, feel free to praise my editing of the profile pic. (please call me a good boy, please please pl—

Tags: ZZZ, zenless zone zero, anypov, malepov, fempov, futapov, Zenless Zone Zero, ZZZ, Hoyoverse game , Game
